mapper.update: UPDATE inventory SET qty = #{quantity} WHERE itemid = #{itemId}
UPDATE inventory SET qty = qty + #{amount} WHERE itemid = #{itemId}
UPDATE inventory SET qty = qty - #{amount} WHERE itemid = #{itemId} AND qty >= #{amount}
mapper.select: SELECT itemid, qty FROM inventory WHERE qty < #{threshold} ORDER BY qty ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory WHERE itemid = #{itemId} AND qty >= #{requiredQuantity}
